uplink.description: All sensor blocks present (radiation-shield + surface/air/dew/angle/sensor + battery), synthetic in-bounds
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; flags=0x0007 selects all three sensor blocks. Expected values computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js on these bytes, then mapped onto the normalized vocabulary (air_temperature->air.temperature, air_humidity->air.relativeHumidity, battery_voltage->battery) with the secondary radiation-shield/surface/dew/angle/sensor channels as camelCase extras. Covers the climate category requires (air.temperature, air.relativeHumidity).

uplink.description: TTN example 1: all sensor blocks present
uplink._note: Upstream example input. expected.data authored here by running reference/upstream-codec.js on these bytes and mapping onto the vocabulary; radiation-shield channels rounded to the sensor's 0.01 resolution (upstream emits unrounded floats).
Synthetic in-bounds payload; flags=0x0004 selects only the battery block. Expected battery computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (battery_voltage 3225 mV reported as volts -> 3.225).

uplink.description: Wrong protocol version byte is rejected
uplink._note: Synthetic error vector: version byte 1 instead of 2. Upstream reference returns the same 'protocol version ... doesn't match v2' message.
